title: Yookidoo Baby Bath Shower Head - Elephant Water Pump with Trunk Spout Rinser - Control Water Flow from 2 Trunk Knobs in Tub or Sink for Infants and Newborn Babies (Turquiose)
features: A compact baby bath shower head rinser makes bathtime for kids, newborns, and toddlers fun!
Requires only ONE HAND to operate, start, and pause the flow of water, so the other hand is free to care for your baby.
Uses a gentle, soothing flow of the baby shower to help even the most sensitive babies adjust to the changes and discomforts of bathing.
Designed especially for tiny hands, the elephant’s hose is soft, flexible, and just the right size for those first grabs.

Using a small coin is easy to open and shut the battery compartment. Tighten all the way before use to ensure no water enters the battery module. This will ensure a steady stream of water and the water will be propelled into the shower nozzle properly.

Reach and wash every little part, from the hair, through the neck, to all those sweet little baby folds. As your baby grows, the elephant becomes an amusing elephant bath toy , for hours of bathing, playing, and fun. Use the gentle, soothing flow of the baby shower to help even the most sensitive babies adjust to the changes and discomforts of bathing. For newborns and infants from age 0 to 24 months From First Splashes to Playful Adventures Nurturing Development Through Sensory Play Makes healthy hygiene for baby easier for parents! Allows a soothing bath time experience free of dripping cups and teary eyes. Introduces sensory play from baby’s first days. Promotes visual focus skills through contrast and movement. Promotes hand eye coordination. Gentle Learning, Joyful Baths As you bathe, help your baby discover different body parts, name them, and turn the stream . At a later age, teach your baby to activate and aim the steady flow of water independently. Verbalize and validate your baby’s reactions, ask questions, and demonstrate attentiveness. What's Inside Battery operated elephant pump with shower head trunk (Color Varies). This gentle elephant shower makes bath-time soothing and fun for babies and newborns – and oh so simple and sweet for parents! Designed with a calming stream, it introduces your little one to the magic of water and becomes a fun elephant bath toy as they grow. The video showcases the product in use.
